title: Realistic Redstone 3D
description: Now redstone and blocks derived from it will have a 3D appearance!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/3D_Redstone/BH_3D_Redstone_header.webp) This resource pack changes Minecraft’s redstone-related blocks and functional components to a 3D-style look. It enhances redstone dust, repeaters, comparators, rails, pistons, furnaces, dispensers, and other related blocks with added depth and detail. The designer of these textures is Ferrum. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/3D_Redstone/BH_3D_Redstone_description.webp) The goal is to make redstone builds and machinery look more visually interesting while keeping the original Minecraft style intact. It’s a simple visual upgrade that improves clarity and makes technical builds stand out more without changing gameplay. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/3D_Redstone/BH_3D_Redstone_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this resourcepack be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![SCREENSHOTS](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/3D_Redstone/BH_3D_Redstone_screenshots.webp) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
